ORDER ON REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS: "THE COURT WILL MAKE ORDERS ON THIS REQUEST AFTER A HEARING", PER JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING RE: DEFENDANT'S REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS PER ORDER DATED MARCH 23, 2012 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, FILED BY LISA GEARHART IS GRANTED. "JUDGMENT DEBTOR IS TO MAKE PAYMENTS OF $15.00 ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH STARTING MAY 15, 2012 AND CONTINUING UNTIL MAY 15, 2018; AMOUNT OF FINAL PAYMENT IS $16.38", PER JUDGE MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT, ONLY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL CALENDAR OF JAN-19-2012 - JUDGMENT ENTERED.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT RESPONDENT RODRIGUEZ, SEAN RECOVER FROM APPELLANT GEARHART, LISA $566.38 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, $500.00 BAD FAITH PER CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,171.38, APPELLANT GEARHART FAILED TO FOLLOW CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5 IN NUMEROUS RESPECTS AND CLAIMED REPAIR COSTS, EXCEPT AS ADMITTED, ARE UNREASONABLE. APPELLANT'S REFUSAL TO RETURN ANY AMOUNT WITHOUT SIGNATURE IS BAD FAITH. BAD FAITH AWARD IS INTENDED TO PUNISH STATUTORY VIOLATION AND ENCOURAGE FUTURE COMPLIANCE. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND CERTIFICATE OF MAILING FILED

MINI MINUTES FOR DEC-01-2011 09:00 AM FOR DEPT 525
REQUEST TO MAKE PAYMENTS. FILED BY DEFENDANT GEARHART, LISA
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT ($45.00 COST = RENEWAL FEE) , $539.35 ACCRUED INTEREST AS TO DEFENDANT GEARHART, LISA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RODRIGUEZ, SEAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GEARHART, LISA $1,541.83 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,646.83, DEFENDANT REQUIRED PLAINTIFF TO SIGN AN ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SEVURITY DEPOSIT DEDUCTIONS AND WHEN HE REFUSED TO DO SO, DEFENDANT REFUSED TO REFUND TO PLAINTIFF ANY OF HIS SECURITY DEPOSIT(INCLUDING A BALANCE OF $150.08 OVER DEDUCTIONS) IN BAD FAITH VIOLATION OF CC 1950.5. STATUTORY DAMAGES ARE APPROPRIATE UNDER THESE CIRCUMSTANCES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

calendar.matters:
Small Claims Hearing Re: Defendant'S Request To Make Payments Per Order Dated March 23, 2012 By Judge Donald S. Mitchell.
Off Calendar May-01-2012 Granted Per Written Order

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Jan-19-2012 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:14am
Judge Pro Tem James Fleming, Clerks Leslie Gomez & Julie Rumsey, nothing on record, dept. 525. Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant, Lisa Gearhart appears in pro per. Respondent, Sean Rodriguez appears in pro per. Parties, previously sworn, testify in the narrative and answer questions from Judge Fleming.

EXHR (1) Security Deposit Itemized List

9:37am
Evidence is retained, matter is taken under submission.

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-01-2011 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: 11:00 am
Judge Pro Tem Elliott Myles, clerk K. Liu, nothing on record, dept. 525
Cause called for Small Claims Appeals, No appearance by Appellant Lis Gearhart and Respondent Sean Rodriguez.

11:02 am
case dismissed

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Sep-19-2011 Judgment Entered
